CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jul-31-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Susan Lee, Clerks: S. Ravinanatapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
Thomas M. Ray, Esq. for Plaintiff Pacific Bell Directory, Joe Torres, Authorized Agent,
was sworn & examined.
Plaintiff Exhibits --- ID/EV
Exh. 1- Written Contract
Exh. 2-Financial Statements of account
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Pacific Bell Directorory and against the defendant: James J. Wheeler DBA Tonka Moving PA, Inc. (Forfeited Corp.) DBA Tonka Moving Company.
Principal $154,176.26
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $337.00
Interest of $14,446.08
For the total Judgment of $169,619.34
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Continued To Aug-29-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
